title: Comfort Ultra Fresh & Protect Coco Fantasy Fabric Conditioner softener with Pro-Fibre Technology Protects Colour and Shape 58 washes (870 ml)
features: Freshness Redefined: Comfort Ultra Fresh & Protect Coco Fantasy Fabric Conditioner provides a multisensory freshness that reawakens all your senses
Ultimate Clothes Protection & Care: Our revolutionary pro-fibre technology protects fibres, locks in colours and helps clothes retain their shape
Enchanting Coco Fantasy Fragrance: This laundry softener has an intense scent combining creamy coconut, exotic fruit and white floral notes
Effective in Short and Cold Cycles: Our laundry conditioner protects the colour, shape and feel of your clothes in various washing conditions
Sustainability: The bottle for this fabric softener contains 100% recycled plastic (excluding cap and sleeve)
Tip for Ultimate Freshness: Pour one full cap into the conditioner compartment of your washing machine
description: Product Description Indulge in a multisensory laundry experience with Comfort Ultra Fresh & Protect Coco Fantasy Fabric Conditioner, giving your clothes ultimate care and protection. This ultra concentrated fabric conditioner is powered by Comfort’s revolutionary pro-fibre technology, which coats each fibre of your clothes to make them stronger and last longer from the first wash*. Our laundry softener works effectively in all washing conditions, including quick or cold washes. Experience bursts of freshness throughout the day thanks to innovative motion-activated technology, releasing an intense fragrance with every move. Let our washing conditioner take you on a journey, where the creamy essence of coconut meets the allure of exotic fruits and delicate white florals. How to use: For best results, use 1–2 caps per load: 15 ml for a 4–5 kg wash load, 32 ml for a 6–7 kg wash load. For an even more intense fragrance experience, pour Comfort scent booster elixir on top of your fabric softener into the conditioner compartment of your washing machine. Our Comfort bottle contains 100% recycled plastic (excluding cap and sleeve); please recycle both the bottle and the cap. Protect fibres, lock in colours and help your clothes retain shape with Comfort Ultra Fresh & Protect. *When using a full cap. Ingredients 5-15%: Cationic Surfactants. <5%: Perfume, Amyl Salicylate, Benzyl Salicylate, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Coumarin, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Tetramethyl acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Vanillin, Lactic acid, Sodium Benzoate. Directions Use 15 ml for a 4-5 kg wash load or 32 ml for a 6-7 kg wash load. Pour into the conditioner compartment of your washing machine. For an intense fragrance, use Comfort scent booster elixir on top of your fabric softener. Manufacturer Contact Information Comfort, Freepost ADM1000, London, SW1A 2XX Unilever Ireland, 20 Riverwalk, National Digital Park, Citywest, Dublin 24. See more
